contactMessage.note: Kami masih berada di tahap awal, tetapi kami sedang membangun. Untuk pertanyaan umum, kolaborasi, atau follow progress Zennyx, kamu bisa menghubungi kami melalui email atau social links resmi.
contactMessage.title: Contact & Follow
contactMessage.description: Zennyx Interactive Studio is still in its early stage. Follow our progress, read our devlogs, or reach out for collaboration and general inquiries.
